candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction (>90%) but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, treat the signal as untested rather than strong — conviction without historical confirmation is a size-down condition, not a trade trigger.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction > 0.85 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier = 0.5  # untested-config penalty until >=1 historical match exists
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
